name: Qwen3 (2507 update)
tagline: Refreshed Qwen3 checkpoints with separate Instruct/Thinking variants and extended context (up to ~1M tokens): Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct/Thinking-2507…
metaDescription: Qwen3 (2507 update) (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-07 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Refreshed Qwen3 checkpoints with separate Instruct/Thinking varia…
overview: Qwen3 (2507 update) is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2025-07. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.

What's notable in this version: Refreshed Qwen3 checkpoints with separate Instruct/Thinking variants and extended context (up to ~1M tokens): Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct/Thinking-2507 and Qwen3-30B-A3B-2507; Apache 2.0.
